name: io.github.automations-project/airtable-user-mcp
title: Airtable User MCP
description: Manage Airtable bases: schema, field CRUD, views, formula validation, extensions

tools.name: get_base_schema
tools.description: Get full schema of all tables, fields, and views in a base

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List all tables in a base with IDs and names

tools.name: get_table_schema
tools.description: Get full schema for a single table including fields and views

tools.name: list_fields
tools.description: List all fields in a table with types and configuration

tools.name: list_views
tools.description: List all views in a table with IDs, names, and types

tools.name: create_field
tools.description: Create a new field including computed types (formula, rollup, lookup, count)

tools.name: create_formula_field
tools.description: Create a formula field (shorthand)

tools.name: validate_formula
tools.description: Validate a formula expression before creating or updating

tools.name: update_formula_field
tools.description: Update the formula text of an existing formula field

tools.name: update_field_config
tools.description: Update configuration of any computed field

tools.name: update_field_description
tools.description: Set or update a field's description text

tools.name: rename_field
tools.description: Rename a field with pre-validation

tools.name: delete_field
tools.description: Delete a field with safety guards and dependency checks

tools.name: duplicate_field
tools.description: Clone a field, optionally copying cell values

tools.name: create_view
tools.description: Create a new view (grid, form, kanban, calendar, gallery, gantt, list)

tools.name: duplicate_view
tools.description: Clone a view with all configuration

tools.name: rename_view
tools.description: Rename a view

tools.name: delete_view
tools.description: Delete a view (cannot delete last view)

tools.name: update_view_description
tools.description: Set or clear a view's description

tools.name: update_view_filters
tools.description: Set filter conditions with AND/OR conjunctions

tools.name: reorder_view_fields
tools.description: Change column order in a view

tools.name: show_or_hide_view_columns
tools.description: Show or hide specific columns in a view

tools.name: apply_view_sorts
tools.description: Set or clear sort conditions on a view

tools.name: update_view_group_levels
tools.description: Set or clear grouping on a view

tools.name: update_view_row_height
tools.description: Change row height (small, medium, large, xlarge)

tools.name: create_extension
tools.description: Register a new extension/block in a base

tools.name: create_extension_dashboard
tools.description: Create a new dashboard page for extensions

tools.name: install_extension
tools.description: Install an extension onto a dashboard page

tools.name: update_extension_state
tools.description: Enable or disable an installed extension

tools.name: rename_extension
tools.description: Rename an installed extension

tools.name: duplicate_extension
tools.description: Clone an installed extension

tools.name: remove_extension
tools.description: Remove an extension from a dashboard
